title: gilbertiodendron limosum
intro: Gilbertiodendron limosum, also known as the Iroko tree, is a species of tropical tree native to the rainforests of Central Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gilbertiodendron limosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
